name: HeroBannerActionsPlacement
description:
Available HeroBanner actions placement options.

Defines where the actions slot is rendered within the hero banner header area.

values.name: BottomStart
values.description: Places the actions below the header text, aligned to the start.
values._jsDoc:
/**
 * Places the actions below the header text, aligned to the start.
 * 
 * @private
 */

values.name: TopEnd
values.description: Places the actions to the right of the header text, aligned to the top of the header row.
values._jsDoc:
/**
 * Places the actions to the right of the header text, aligned to the top of the header row.
 * 
 * @private
 */

_jsDoc:
/**
 * Available HeroBanner actions placement options.
 * 
 * Defines where the actions slot is rendered within the hero banner header area.
 * 
 * @enum {string}
 * @alias module:@ui5/webcomponents-fiori/dist/types/HeroBannerActionsPlacement
 * @ui5-module-override @ui5/webcomponents-fiori dist.types.HeroBannerActionsPlacement
 * @private
 */
